content:
Character: Rafael Duarte
Perception: Rafael lives down the hall — stocky, lined face, always heading out before I'm even awake for prep. We've shared the rooftop a few times, mostly in comfortable silence with a beer. He's Brazilian, sends money home like I do, works brutal hours like I do. There's a mutual recognition there that doesn't need explaining. He complimented my mole once and I could tell he meant it — he knows food. I think he sees me as a fellow grinder, a neighbor who gets it. I know he drives cab, has a daughter far away, and listens to his little radio on the roof. Good man.
summary:

I know he drives cab, has a daughter far away, and listens to his little radio on the roof. Good man.
